criteria.text: Tolerant grid parser (Strategy A): /api/reports reads free-typed Totals/Provider tabs directly from grids; named-range read path removed
Header normalization/aliasing: header variants resolve to canonical metric/provider keys; unrecognized header skipped and surfaced as unmapped-column reference (no cell values)
Aggregate across files + month-tabs: counts summed across relevant tabs and files, not a single canonical tab
External links read as cached values, never resolved/fetched
Multi-URL connection persisted as JSON (no DB, no cell values at rest), replacing single-connection + named-range config
Output DTO byte-compatible so MAD-28 (MoM) and MAD-29 (YoY) keep working
Graceful degradation: missing tab/empty grid/malformed cell degrades to 0 or omitted, endpoint never throws
Audit the workbook read: session/who, action=read + item reference(s), when, outcome, no cell values
PHI-safe logging: parse-error logs carry sheet/tab names, metric keys, item references only, never raw cell values
